long_form.title: The Terrifying Evolution of Nuclear Weapons: Global Proliferation (1938-2022)
long_form.description: This video uncovers the alarming history of nuclear weapons proliferation across the globe, visualized with data spanning from 1938 to 2022. Witness the rise and fall of nuclear powers, understand which nations possess these devastating weapons, and observe how the global threat has evolved over nearly a century. This crucial visualization highlights critical moments and shifts in the nuclear landscape, revealing the shocking truth of humanity's most dangerous invention. Data sourced from Our World in Data.

short.title: Nobody Saw This Coming: North Korea's Shocking Nuclear Leap (2003-2022) #Shorts
short.description: Witness the astonishing speed of North Korea's nuclear weapon development between 2003 and 2022, as they rapidly ascended to become a top global nuclear power. This short reveals how a nation went from #11 to #3 in just 19 years, a truly unexpected shift in the global nuclear landscape.
